name: Margarita Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Lime, zested (outer green part grated off)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the crushed pretzels, sugar, and melted butter. Mix well and press into a 9-inch buttered pie pan. Chill the crust in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
2. In another medium bowl, mix together the lime zest, lime juice, sweetened condensed milk, tequila, and triple sec.
3. Fold in the whipped heavy cream and green food coloring (if using). Pour the mixture into the chilled pie crust.
4. Freeze the pie for 4 hours.
5. Decorate with the remaining whipped cream, crushed pretzels, and mint leaves before serving.
